name: Storyblok
description: Manage Storyblok CMS content from AI chat via Storyblok's hosted MCP endpoint. Search, describe, and execute Management API operations across spaces, stories, components, assets, and workflows. No local install needed.

inputs.label: Storyblok Personal Access Token
inputs.description: Personal access token (PAT) for the Storyblok Management API. Used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to Storyblok
2. Open My account > Account settings > Personal access tokens
3. Generate a new personal access token
4. Copy the token

auth.instructions: Requires a Storyblok personal access token (PAT). Create one under My account > Account settings > Personal access tokens, then provide it as a Bearer token.
